<?php namespace Aws\Crypto; interface MetadataStrategyInterface { /** * Places the information in the MetadataEnvelope to the strategy specific * location. Populates the PutObject arguments with any information * necessary for loading. * * @param MetadataEnvelope $envelope Encryption data to save according to * the strategy. * @param array $args Starting arguments for PutObject. * * @return array Updated arguments for PutObject. */ public function save(MetadataEnvelope $envelope, array $args); /** * Generates a MetadataEnvelope according to the specific strategy using the * passed arguments. * * @param array $args Arguments from Command and Result that contains * S3 Object information, relevant headers, and command * configuration. * * @return MetadataEnvelope */ public function load(array $args); }
